title: Entering the era of single-cell transcriptomics in biology and medicine
author: Sandberg, Rickard
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Recent technical advances have enabled single-cell RNA sequencing (RNA-seq). The first exploratory studies have already led to insights into the dynamics of differentiation, cellular responses to stimulation and the stochastic nature of transcription. We are entering an era of single-cell transcriptomics that holds promise to substantially impact biology and medicine.
steps_raw: Recent technical advances have enabled single-cell RNA sequencing (RNA-seq). The first exploratory studies have already led to insights into the dynamics of differentiation, cellular responses to stimulation and the stochastic nature of transcription. We are entering an era of single-cell transcriptomics that holds promise to substantially impact biology and medicine.
